title: Mediterranean Blue Alley Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Mediterranean Blue Alley Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic Mediterranean alley fashion portrait of adult woman with long wavy hair and relaxed travel-fashion presence in blue fitted sleeveless top and long flowing white skirt, barefoot, set in vibrant Mediterranean alley with vivid blue-painted walls, stone stairs, white accents, patterned fabric, small windows, and plants. Subject: adult woman with long wavy hair and relaxed travel-fashion presence sits on stone steps with calm relaxed expression with eyes slightly downward, long natural hair, relaxed posture, and full-body fashion presence. Scene: vibrant Mediterranean alley with vivid blue-painted walls, stone stairs, white accents, patterned fabric, small windows, and plants features vivid blue-painted walls, stairs, buildings with white accents, hanging patterned fabric, small windows, and plants above. Composition: Fixed slightly low front-facing full-body framing on stone steps, subject sharp against detailed blue alley architecture, with strong perspective depth and balanced body placement. Signature Elements: Preserved mediterranean blue alley fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic travel fashion photography with crisp textures, vibrant Mediterranean atmosphere, saturated color contrast, natural skin tones, and editorial lifestyle polish. Color Palette: Fixed saturated cobalt and Mediterranean blue walls, clean white architectural accents, natural skin tones, soft fabric whites, and warm sunlight contrast. Lighting: Strong natural sunlight with high-contrast crisp shadows, realistic depth, bright highlights on blue walls, and clean subject separation. Camera: Slightly low front-facing angle, full-body framing, sharp focus on subject, detailed alley background, and realistic depth without artificial blur. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
